name: Petal
description: Single petals pressed across the canvas, each at its own angle, with the odd golden bud between — every redraw sets the petals spinning to rest anew.

code.style: --pet: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rot: @rand(360deg); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 6%; background: var(--pet); clip-path: @shape(drop); transform: rotate(var(--rot)); opacity: 0.92; transition: ease 600ms; } } @random(0.18) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 13%; left: 43.5%; top: 43.5%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color5); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
